stories: Daily Market Pulse — Wed, Jul 08, 2026 (15:28 UTC)
Middle East risk premium re-accelerates: Trump says Iran ceasefire is “over”
U.S. equities: modestly lower close, with “narrow leadership” warning signs
ECB messaging adds a second rates/FX catalyst: inflation risks “not fully resolved”
Macro regime risk: policy unpredictability increasingly treated as a baseline market variable
Industrial metals check: copper pulls back ~7% from June highs (still up YTD)
China FX: offshore yuan holds near 6.8000 as PBOC pushes Hong Kong offshore-hub plan
Premarket tape: “oil-up” dispersion—energy bid while fuel-sensitive names soften
Insider sell pressure (thin liquidity risk): Butterfly Network ($BFLY) exec sold ~399K shares (~$1.89M)
Index classification risk: S&P Dow Jones follows MSCI putting a Southeast Asian market on “frontier” watch
